name: Spaghetti Dish #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan with cooking spray.
3. To prepare the crust, cook pasta in a saucepan with a large amount of boiling water for 10 to 12 minutes or until tender. Drain well. Return to saucepan and stir margarine, egg whites, and Parmesan cheese into hot pasta. Press spaghetti mixture onto the bottom of the prepared pan.
4. Spread cottage cheese over the crust.
5. To prepare the filling, cook turkey, onions, and peppers in a skillet until meat is no longer pink. Drain off fat if needed. Stir in tomato sauce, oregano, basil, and salt. Spread meat mixture over cottage cheese.
6. Sprinkle mozzarella cheese over meat mixture. Bake for 25 minutes.
